<think> I know that Richard Berry is a singer and songwriter, and I have knowledge about his work. The album "The First Four Years" is a compilation album by The Standells, an American garage rock band. Richard Berry is known for writing the song "Louie, Louie", which was covered by The Standells. I'm going to look up the tracklist of "The First Four Years" to see if "Louie, Louie" is included. Ah, yes, it is. Therefore, I can conclude that Richard Berry wrote "Louie, Louie" for The Standells' album "The First Four Years".</think>
<answer> Louie, Louie </answer>
